experiments.paper_title: Parallel Clustering Algorithm for the k-medoids Problem in High-dimensional Space for Large-scale Datasets
models_used: Parallel primal-dual heuristic algorithm for k-medoids
Novel vectorization technique (for handling images, text, and point data)
experiments.key_results: The proposed algorithm demonstrates superiority over existing k-medoids clustering algorithms in terms of solution quality and run time on BIRCH and Stanford Dog datasets. It introduces a novel vectorization technique that enables it to handle various data types, including text.
